about_item: Single Bag Listing: Includes one (1) Dog Away Tote Bag with lined food carrier – ideal for daily travel, overnight stays, or weekend adventures.
Organized Pet Travel: Spacious interior with multiple pockets keeps food, treats, leash, and toys neatly separated for stress-free trips.
Durable & Water-Resistant: Constructed from high-density polyester with reinforced stitching and smooth zippers that withstand everyday use.
Travel-Ready Design: Fits over luggage handles; adjustable padded shoulder strap for comfortable, hands-free carrying.
Trusted Brand: From Mobile Dog Gear, the leader in premium pet travel bags designed for modern, organized dog owners.

summary.text: Customers find the dog carrier spacious and perfect for small dogs, with one mentioning it fits a few small cans of food. The bag is travel-friendly, particularly for frequent pet owners, and customers appreciate its capacity to hold everything needed. They like the pockets, with one noting the outside pockets for quick access, and find it cute, with several mentioning the pink color option for female dogs. The functionality and quality receive positive feedback, though opinions on value are mixed, with some finding it a great value while others consider it pricey.

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers like the size of the carrier, finding it spacious and perfect for small dogs, with room for toys. One customer notes that the side pocket fits a water bottle well.

authors_reviews.title: It’s a great bag.
authors_reviews.text: I am very happy with this bag. It holds everything I need for my dog. She is a golden retriever mix. Since the earthquakes here in California I have added a pet first aid kit. The bag is large enough to accommodate everything and it still isn’t heavy. It’s great for day trips when we take her. I love the little zippered bag that was included, it’s perfect for dog food or treats. I would highly recommend this bag.
authors_reviews.author: dora henderson

authors_reviews.title: He comes to work with me a few days a week and this bag is perfect for keeping all his toys
authors_reviews.text: I use this as my pups "day bag" or briefcase. He comes to work with me a few days a week and this bag is perfect for keeping all his toys, bowls, food, and any other little things he'll need for a day away from home. Bag is well made, has nice exterior pockets and a shoulder strap for when your hands are full, and the food bag is nice too. Only change I would make is to put one or two small pockets inside, but that really is such a minor detail. Quality product, fast shipping. Will get the larger one for over-night travel when we go away this spring.**Update** After a couple weeks of use this bag is still going strong! No issues with quality at all. Holds everything he needs for a day out-and-about. I've even washed the food baggie (regular dish soap and sponge, left to air-dry overnight) and everything is working really well. Very happy with purchase.
authors_reviews.author: JLLambert

authors_reviews.title: Lightweight Travel Bag for Pups!
authors_reviews.text: I purchased the travel bag tote for my new puppy and it is has been a great organizer for our trips on the go. It is super cute and has many pockets and compartments to organize all of your dogs essentials. I like to keep mine packed and ready to go in the car. It comes with a zippered insulated food container, but I use the Bento Bowls so I don't need to use it. The size is perfect for everything you need for a day away or just a trip to the park. I keep her blanket, toys, treats, extra leash and harness, poop bags, wipes, hand sanitizer and puppy pads for emergencies. It fits everything I need and is always ready to go. I definitely recommend this bag, its lightweight and holds everything you need!
authors_reviews.author: JennEinNJ

authors_reviews.title: Pricey but worth it
authors_reviews.text: The price is pretty high I feel like it could be lower because its a simple bag. But it is a good quality bag. Alot bigger than I thought and holds alot.
authors_reviews.author: Amaris Delgado

authors_reviews.title: Great size-canvas exterior is sturdy but not stiff, holds perfect amount, side-pockets extremely helpful!
authors_reviews.text: I lLOVE this dog travel bag and use it regularly! I have it packed with necessary travel items all of the time and only have to add food and water when we go places-taking all the worry out of traveling (e.g.-did I bring her brush, extra blanket, long leash?). Now I don't have to try to remember everything because the travel bag is ready. The side pockets are used for quick needs-clean up bags, brush, bowls (collapsible) and I don't have to dig for those items. The inside is good sized and easy to get things in and out of, holds plenty and still room for toys. If I had to change anything it would be to have a lighter interior material-like a purse, dark interiors do make it a bit harder to see individual items-however, this does have a light design on it which is cute.
authors_reviews.author: Dazydu

authors_reviews.title: Take them anywhere!
authors_reviews.text: Love this product! This allows me to carry everything my service dog could need for a day on the job. Outside pockets hold her collapsable bowl and dog hanger (also purchased from Amazon). Large enough to hold everything but light enough to be easily portable. Great value and performance.
authors_reviews.author: Dawn Drooger

authors_reviews.title: The quality is good. The food containers are really small
authors_reviews.text: The quality is good. The food containers are really small. Really only good for a day trip and wouldn't hold enough food for an overnight trip for medium-large dogs who eat more than 1 or 2 cups per day.
authors_reviews.author: Kaitlyn

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for a travel or go bag for cats too.
authors_reviews.text: I got this as a travel or go bag for my 2 kittens. Perfect size! The food container fits a few small cans of food. I put dry food in a gallon FoodSaver bag and litter in another. Both fit in the bag with the food container, some wee wee pads in a smaller FoodSaver bag and collapsible bowls and baby spoon in a sandwich bag. I bought a small pet first aid kit that fits in one of the front pockets and their harnesses and leash fit in the other in a sandwich bag. I also have a portable litter box in the back flap with two small blankets. There is a water bottle holder on the side and the front zipper has a few mousies and toys. Still have some room.
authors_reviews.author: TMarieC

other_countries_reviews.title: Funcional
other_countries_reviews.text: Practico para llevar el equipaje de tu mascota... buen tamaño para 3 dias
other_countries_reviews.author: Seny

other_countries_reviews.title: Great bag, more room than I thought!
other_countries_reviews.text: This bag is great for my Patterdale terrier. It's got loads of room - I've been able add 2 large collapsible bowls, 6 food pouches, bags of treats, a ball, a small towel, 2 medium sized blankets, a box of biscuit food for 3 days, a food mat and there's still a bit more room and meshes on the outside to put stuff. I thought it might be a bit small, but I took the risk and I'm really pleased with it. Would recommend it.
other_countries_reviews.author: MJHarry

other_countries_reviews.title: Love it
other_countries_reviews.text: My puppy and I love this bag. Very durable, and it makes it so easy to take her anywhere having a prepacked bag. Love the food container as well.
other_countries_reviews.author: JANEWRIGHT

other_countries_reviews.title: Tolle Hundetasche
other_countries_reviews.text: Tasche sieht gut aus, macht einen stabilen Eindruck, sehr geräumig. Gefällt mir sehr gut. Optimale Tasche für unsere Therapiehunde Einsätze.
other_countries_reviews.author: Tanja Neugebauer-Galsterer
